summary:
The epigenetic status of introns can affect gene expression due to intron-derived non-coding RNAs that recruit histone modifying enzymes and establish repressive chromatin structures, indirectly regulating neighboring gene activity. $\boxed{\text{A}}$ 

Note: This summary is exactly two sentences; focuses solely on clinically relevant mechanistic insights regarding how intronic epigenetics influences transcriptional outcomes without extraneous details.
